10.content: i feel like i'm just going through the motions. everything feels so pointless, like there's no real difference between being here or not being here. does any of this actually mean anything?

11.content: i just don't know what the point is anymore. i did everything i could for him. i stayed up every night, i missed everything in my own life, and he still died. i feel like i just wasted years of my life for nothing. i'm so tired. i'm just so incredibly tired of everything.

12.content: i just feel like im so tired of fighting. like every single day is just more work to exist as myself and the world just makes it so hard. i dont know how much longer i can actually keep doing this.

13.content: i dont even know what to do anymore. the debt is just... it's everywhere. i look at the numbers and i feel like i'm drowning. there's no way out of this, like i've tried everything and i'm just more stuck than when i started. it feels like i'm just backed into a corner with no exit.

14.content: i just feel like im so tired of trying to fix myself. like no matter what i do, i just end up back in this same dark place. it feels like i was just born broken, you know? like there's nothing left to salvage at this point.

15.content: i feel like i've been walking for so long... just through this thick, grey fog. i kept thinking there was a destination, some kind of clearing or light at the end of the trail. but i've reached the edge. the path just stops here, right at the lip of a great, silent canyon. there's nothing left to walk on. it just feels so heavy... like the journey was never meant to go any further than this.

1.content: sometimes i just sit here staring at the wall and realize how much of a joke it all is. like, we spend our whole lives struggling, working, feeling pain, just to end up as nothing in a universe that doesn't even know we exist. it feels so pointless. if there's no grand design and no actual meaning to any of this, why are we even forced to participate in the struggle?

2.content: it’s too much. the wound won't stop bleeding and i can't even feel my legs anymore. i'm just so tired of fighting for a world that's already dead. i don't think i can make it through the night.

3.content: i just feel like i'm drowning lately. everything is so expensive and i'm working so hard but it feels like we're just getting deeper in debt. i look at my wife and the kids and i just feel like a weight around their necks. like i'm just dragging them down with me.

4.content: i don't even recognize myself anymore. everything i worked for, the name, the respect... it's just gone. i feel like a ghost walking around. there's nothing left of me to actually live for.

5.content: i just dont know how to be in this house anymore. it's so quiet. i keep waiting to hear him move around in the other room but it never happens. everything just feels so grey and heavy. i'm so tired of carrying this.

6.content: i just feel so tired of everything. like, no matter how hard i try to act normal or fit in with everyone else, it just feels like i'm playing a character in a play i never auditioned for. it's exhausting to exist when you know you'll never actually belong anywhere.

7.content: i feel like everything i ever made was just a lie. i look at my studio and it just feels like a graveyard of things that don't matter anymore. there's nothing left in me. no more colors, no more ideas... just this massive, empty silence. it feels like i've already finished my story and i'm just waiting for the credits to roll.

8.content: everything just feels so heavy lately. like i'm just moving through mud for no reason. i'm so tired of trying to keep it together when nothing ever actually changes.

9.content: everything is just getting so much harder lately. my joints ache every single day and i can barely even walk to the mailbox without needing to sit down. it feels like my body is just a cage that's slowly closing in on me. i'm just sitting here in this quiet house and it feels like i'm already gone, you know? just waiting for the clock to run out.
